title: Wine Bottle Stoppers,3 Pcs Metal Heart-Shaped Bottle Stoppers Love Hearts Shaped Beer Bottle Sealer, for Sealing Wine, Champagne, Beer,Collection, Birthday, Wedding.
features: Material: This wine stopper is made of high quality plastic and durable silica gel, sturdy and fashion.It will not be affected by the acid and alkali of red wine and will not rust.

Specification:It is mostly suitable for bottle mouths with a diameter of 0.6-0.79in / 15-20mm. The size of the wine stopper is about 4.3*1.7*0.83in (11*4.3*2.1CM). Each pack contains 3 wine stoppers, enough for daily use.
Seal Deaign: the bottle stopper has a good seal and is perfect for preventing air leaks and keeping your wine, champagne and other carbonated drinks fresh.
Easy to use：Easy to insert and remove from the bottle,simply press the stopper into the bottleneck.Superior barware,kitchen and refrigerator supplies.
Applications: The edges are smooth, suitable for a variety of red wine, champagne, wine to maintain its freshness.
